Why Iran war oil price shock won't stop Fed pick Kevin Warsh from cutting interest rates
items.description: President Donald Trump's choice to lead the Federal Reserve sees inflation risk very differently than Chairman Jerome Powell.

items.title: The U.S. insists the Iran conflict won't be a 'forever war.' Experts beg to differ
items.description: President Trump and his officials say the war won't be protracted. Experts say it could go on longer than the White House expects.

items.title: How the Iran conflict is spreading — in pictures
items.description: Images published Thursday showed destruction across Tehran after nearly a week of strikes on Iran's capital.

items.title: Sen. Merkley proposes prediction market ban for government officials after Maduro, Iran bets
items.description: After a series of dubious bets placed on the ouster of Venezuela's Maduro and Iran strikes, lawmakers are looking to ban insider trading on prediction...
